active.summary: Ontology architecture research must become bounded evidence, proof gates, and registry source mappings before ontology, graph-vector, or pilot-scale claims are promoted into product architecture.
active.current_boundary: Not validated by ACP projection or M047 documentation work.
active.why_open: Imported ontology research remains strategically relevant but includes unverified standards, corpus, formal logic, graph-vector, and scale assumptions.

active.summary: FalkorDB graph ingestion proof requires verified loading path, explicit source shape, idempotency, counts, constraints, error handling, and cleanup before larger retrieval or pilot claims rely on loaded graph data.
active.current_boundary: Partially evidenced by earlier bounded ingest work, but not fully validated.
active.why_open: Larger corpus ingest, failed/skipped row accounting, resource profile, update/upsert semantics, production loading policy, and recovery remain open.

active.summary: Proof-heavy GSD milestones must include an independent review gate that inspects test substance and bare result artifacts without relying on the implementation under test.
active.current_boundary: Standing review gate for future proof cycles; M047 should apply or explicitly scope independent review before closeout.
active.why_open: Prior proof work showed passing tests can be misleading when tests are empty, over-mocked, or only verify the implementation's own claims.

deferred: Production Legal KnowQL API wrapper around MiniMax/PyO3
Russian legal terminology quality evaluation for provider-generated Cypher
Production schema grounding beyond the synthetic LegalGraph-shaped fixture
out_of_scope_note: Out-of-scope and deferred requirements remain outside this documentation pack unless future GSD milestones explicitly reopen them.
